title: Kida being loud
description: some kids making so much noise at night, keep your kids in check please

title: Fake utility payment email reported
description: Residents received an email pretending to be from the city utility office asking for urgent payment.

title: Multiple fake toll payment texts reported
description: Several users reported text messages asking them to pay overdue toll charges through a suspicious link.

title: Repeated vehicle break-in posts near apartment complex
description: Three similar reports mention overnight vehicle break-ins in the same parking area.

title: Suspicious QR code flyer found in lobby
description: A resident reported a flyer with a QR code that redirected to a fake account login page.

title: Loose streetlight wiring near park entrance
description: Exposed wiring was reported near the entrance walkway and may pose a safety risk.

title: Home router default password warning
description: A local digital safety workshop warned that several households are still using default router passwords.

title: Unverified post about gas leak spreads quickly
description: A widely shared social post claimed there was a gas leak, but no official source confirmed it.

title: Package theft reports increase on one block
description: Residents on the same block reported missing delivered packages over two consecutive days.

title: Fake bank password reset email
description: Residents received an email claiming unusual banking activity and requesting password reset through a non-bank link.

title: Community center Wi-Fi portal imitation
description: A spoofed captive portal appeared near the community center asking users to sign in with email credentials.
